items.name: expandable-tabs
items.title: Expandable Tabs
items.description: Animated icon tabs with a sliding active pill and an expanding label, built on the shadcn tooltip.

items.name: command-tabs
items.title: Command Tabs
items.description: A copyable command block with attached agent tabs and a sliding active pill — tabs can sit above or below the command.

items.name: permission-selector
items.title: Permission Selector
items.description: A composable segmented permission control with an animated sliding pill — read/write levels and deny/neutral/allow toggles.

items.name: braille-loader
items.title: Braille Loader
items.description: An animated braille loading indicator with wave, typewriter, shimmer, and pulse variants.
